message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false

package "domain" {

interface "INodeVisitor" as INodeVisitor <<I>> {
  + visit(node: Probe)
  + visit(node: Input)
  + visit(node: AndGate)
  + visit(node: NAndGate)
  + visit(node: NOrGate)
  + visit(node: NotGate)
  + visit(node: OrGate)
  + visit(node: XOrGate)
}

class "Circuit" as Circuit <<C>> {
  + Circuit()
  + addNode(node: Node)
  + addInput(node: Input)
  + addProbe(node: Probe)
  + getNodes(): Set<Node>
  + getInputs(): Set<Input>
  + getInput(name: String)
  + getProbes(): Set<Probe>
  + getProbe(name: String)
  + simulate()
  + addSimulationListener(simulationListener: ISimulationListener)
  + addSimulationListeners(simulationListeners: Collection<ISimulationListener>)
}

abstract class "Node" as Node <<A>> {
  - value: boolean
  - name: String
  + Node(name: String)
  + getValue(): boolean
  + getName(): String
  + addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)
  + addSimulationListener(simulationListener: ISimulationListener)
  # notifyStartCalculation()
  # notifyStopCalculation(calculatedValue: boolean)
  {abstract} + calculate(): boolean
  + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
}

abstract class "NodeComposite" as NodeComposite <<A>> {
  - parents: List<Node>
  + NodeComposite(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
  + add(parent: Node)
  + remove(parent: Node)
  + getParents(): List<Node>
  + calculate(): boolean
}

interface "ISimulationListener" as ISimulationListener <<I>>

class "Input" as Input <<C>> {
  + Input(value: boolean, name: String)
  + setValue(value: boolean)
  + calculate(): boolean
  + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
  + addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)
}

class "Probe" as Probe <<C>> {
  + Probe(name: String)
  + Probe(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
  + calculate(): boolean
  + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
  + addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)
}

class "AndGate" as AndGate <<C>> {
  + AndGate(name: String)
  + AndGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
  + calculate(): boolean
  + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
}

class "NandGate" as NandGate <<C>> {
  + NAndGate(name: String)
  + NAndGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
  + calculate(): boolean
  + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
}

class "NOrGate" as NOrGate <<C>> {
  + NOrGate(name: String)
  + NOrGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
  + calculate(): boolean
  + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
}

class "NotGate" as NotGate <<C>> {
  + NotGate(name: String)
  + NotGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
  + calculate(): boolean
  + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
}

class "OrGate" as OrGate <<C>> {
  + OrGate(name: String)
  + OrGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
  + calculate(): boolean
  + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
}

class "XOrGate" as XOrGate <<C>> {
  + XOrGate(name: String)
  + XOrGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
  + calculate(): boolean
  + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
}

' Inheritance
NodeComposite --|> Node
AndGate --|> NodeComposite
NandGate --|> NodeComposite
NOrGate --|> NodeComposite
NotGate --|> NodeComposite
OrGate --|> NodeComposite
XOrGate --|> NodeComposite
Probe --|> NodeComposite
Input --|> Node

' Associations / aggregations
Circuit "1" o-- "0..*" Node : nodes
Circuit "1" o-- "0..*" Input : inputs
Circuit "1" o-- "0..*" Probe : probes
Circuit "1" o-- "0..*" ISimulationListener : simulationListeners

Node "1" o-- "0..*" ISimulationListener : simulationListeners
NodeComposite "4..*" --> "parents" Node

}
@enduml
```
